/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/llama-cli.dir/cli.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-cli  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/kevin/Desktop/p2pllms/llama/llamasrc/build/bin ../server/libserver-context.a ../../common/libcommon.a ../../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security ../../bin/libmtmd.0.0.8182.dylib ../../bin/libllama.0.0.8182.dylib ../../bin/libggml.0.9.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml-cpu.0.9.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml-metal.0.9.7.dylib ../../bin/libggml-base.0.9.7.dylib
